title: My first Quarto blog
text:
This will be a blog dedicated to fumbling, bumbling, and wrangling with Danish publicly available data.
The main purpose will be to:

Show the process of converting data in (hopefully not too) different formats
Show what can be done with simple publicly available data
Freely interpret on what the data mean (within the limits of my statistical and epidemiological knowledge)
Play around with R, Quarto, and data analysis in general

I do this because I am thoroughly interested in data analysis and interpretation, and because I love playing detective and figuring stuff out.
